goal: Build a mixed-geometry station: 2 cubes + 2 spheres on conveyor → bin. Tests handler with heterogeneous object types in source_paths.
thoughts:
Six mixed-geometry specifics for CP-44 (extends CP-01 — heterogeneous source items):
1) 2 cubes (5cm) + 2 spheres (5cm diameter) on conveyor. source_paths includes both types.
2) Cube_1, Cube_2 at x=[-1.4, -1.1]; Sphere_1, Sphere_2 at x=[-0.8, -0.5].
3) Handler uses bbox center for pick — same for cube and sphere. Plan invariant.
4) All items same effective size (5cm) so gripper close-distance unchanged.
5) Industrial use: mixed-SKU lines with shape variation (e.g., cosmetics, hardware, small parts).
6) source_paths order arbitrary — controller picks closest-by-reach regardless.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# 2 cubes + 2 spheres mixed
for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.1]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

for i, x in enumerate([-0.8, -0.5]):
    path = f"/World/Sphere_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Sphere", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], radius=0.025)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

all_items = ["/World/Cube_1", "/World/Cube_2", "/World/Sphere_1", "/World/Sphere_2"]
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=all_items,
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in all_items:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=all_items,
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    drop_target=[0.0, -0.4, 0.95],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-44 demonstrates handler agnosticism to object type — cubes and spheres processed identically via bbox center. source_paths can be any pickable prim.
failure_modes: Spheres roll on belt — picking timing harder. Sensor catches when sphere passes; cube static.
Gripper close on sphere fragile vs cube. Half delivery rate.
Cubes land flat in bin; spheres pile/roll. Bin floor matters less than xy match.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (180s sim — orig 90s. cube_final=(-0.02, -0.49, 0.785) in Bin)
code_template:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size={{workpieces[0].size}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size={{workpieces[1].size}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Sphere", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, radius={{workpieces[2].radius}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Sphere", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, radius={{workpieces[3].radius}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name=api)

all_items = [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}]
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=all_items,
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in all_items:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, position={{primary_destination.position}}, size={{primary_destination.size}})

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=all_items,
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    drop_target=[0.0, -0.4, 0.95],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{primary_destination.path}}],
)
